---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0002
alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-12-01
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-01                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by running the four requested finance docs through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each listed invoice/bill while preserving each original body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved original bodies exactly during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR four listed finance records. Each target file contained visible required schema data (invoice/bill metadata and line items), allowing deterministic frontmatter extraction per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. All four files were updated in place and the inbox file was removed per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update guidance.
